# DRAGONDEX

> DRAGONDEX is a decentralized exchange (DEX) on OPN Testnet (Chain ID 984) using the UniswapV2-style AMM model. Users can swap tokens, provide liquidity, and earn 0.3% trading fees.

DRAGONDEX runs entirely on-chain with non-custodial wallet connections (MetaMask, WalletConnect, Coinbase, OKX, Rabby, Bitget, and more). It features multi-hop routing, automatic slippage tuning, native OPN↔WOPN wrap/unwrap, real-time analytics, and an AI assistant (DragonBot) for trading help.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of DRAGONDEX, hero, featured pools, and protocol stats.
- [Swap](/swap): Trade any supported token pair with multi-hop routing and price-impact protection.
- [Liquidity](/liquidity): Add or remove liquidity from token pairs and earn 0.3% fees.
- [Pools](/pools): Browse all liquidity pools with TVL, volume, and APR data.
- [Create Pool](/create-pool): Bootstrap a brand-new token pair on the AMM.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Protocol-wide analytics — TVL, volume, top pairs, charts.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Track token balances, LP positions, transaction history, and send tokens.
- [Docs](/docs): User guides, DeFi concepts, smart-contract addresses, FAQ, and roadmap.

## Optional

- [Block Explorer](https://testnet.iopn.tech): OPN Testnet block explorer for verifying transactions.
